title: Storage and Battery
drDigitalIntro:
When your computer is slow, storage might be full.
• Storage shows what's taking up space — photos, apps, files.
• Delete large files you don't need to free up space.
• Empty the Trash to actually reclaim the space.

steps.say: Click Storage in the sidebar to see what's using space.
Delete 'Old Videos' — you don't need them anymore.
Now empty the Trash to actually free the space.

drDigitalSuccess: You freed up 4 GB! Remember: deleting files moves them to Trash. Empty the Trash to actually reclaim the space.
drDigitalHint: Go to Storage, click Delete next to Old Videos, then click Empty Trash.
